step_rationale: Acylcarnitine accumulation reflects mitochondrial β-oxidation stress during ischemia.
mechanism: Ischemia-induced mitochondrial dysfunction generates acylcarnitine biomarkers of myocardial energy depletion.

references.title: GC-MS validation and analysis of targeted plasma metabolites related to carbonyl stress in type 2 diabetes mellitus patients with and without acute coronary syndrome.
Pilot study of myocardial ischemia-induced metabolomic changes in emergency department patients undergoing stress testing.
